claims: The skill requests Full Disk Access for Python, which is a broad system permission granting read access to all files on the disk, while its stated purpose is only to read the specific Messages database at `~/Library/Messages/chat.db`. This is excessive and could expose other sensitive user data (e.g., documents, emails, passwords) without a clear, minimal necessity tied solely to reading SMS and iMessages for 2FA codes or message history.
